name: pds
description: Teach, audit, implement, review, and bootstrap designer-ready React apps with the PDS design system.

interface.shortDescription: Use PDS to learn, audit, build, review, or start React web apps.
interface.longDescription: Helps product designers and AI coding agents adopt PDS in React web projects: learn the plugin workflow, audit existing apps, implement product screens from briefs or Figma handoff, review generated UI against PDS, and bootstrap new Vite React apps.
defaultPrompt: Teach me how to use the PDS plugin
Audit this app for PDS adoption
Start a new PDS React app here
